segments.text: Yaubara's Samus sitting on an 80% lead!
segments.original_text: 80%のリードを矢浦サムスが取っている状態

segments.text: Ness coming up from below with max delay
segments.original_text: ネスが下から最大ディレイで

segments.text: riding the bomb on the way in, but
segments.original_text: ボムを操作しながら帰ってくるが

segments.text: Charged Shot to the ledge getup!
segments.original_text: 崖上がりにチャージショット

full_text: Yaubara's Samus sitting on an 80% lead! And now the ledge... Can he make it back? Ness coming up from below with max delay riding the bomb on the way in, but Charged Shot to the ledge getup! Nice!
